name: Chiipotle Fried Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F and line a large baking sheet with paper towels.
2. Slice the onion paper-thin using a mandoline or other manual slicer, separating into rings.
3. Heat oil in a deep kettle or deep fryer to 375°F.
4. In a large bowl, stir together flour and chipotle rub until well combined.
5. Add onion rings to the flour mixture and toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Using a slotted spoon, add a handful of onion rings to hot oil and fry, stirring occasionally, until crisp, about 30 seconds.
7. Transfer fried onion rings to the baking sheet using the slotted spoon to drain excess oil.
8. Repeat with remaining onion rings. (Onion rings may be made up to 15 minutes ahead and kept warm in a 250°F oven.)
